# Editorial gates

- [ ] Original contribution passed
- [ ] Distinct intent confirmed
- [ ] Evidence QA passed
- [ ] Editorial QA approved
- [ ] Affiliate QA passed
- [ ] Testing disclosure accurate
- [ ] Visible sources present

# Technical gates

- [ ] Lint passed
- [ ] Tests passed or absence documented
- [ ] Build passed
- [ ] Diff check passed
- [ ] Canonical verified
- [ ] Schema verified
- [ ] FAQ parity verified or not applicable
- [ ] Internal links checked
- [ ] Sitemap updated
- [ ] Mobile containment checked
- [ ] No page-level overflow
- [ ] Raw affiliate scan passed

- Content commit:
- `origin/main` status:
- Vercel status:
- Live URL:
- Production sitemap status:
- IndexNow status:
- Final QA state:

- Volatile claims:
- Unresolved gaps:
- Global changes:

# Reviewer decision

- [ ] Reject
- [ ] Return for correction
- [ ] Approve for merge
